overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a medieval harbor town at sunset. The character exits a brick tunnel into a bustling dock area with wooden stalls and sailing ships, then navigates through narrow cobblestone streets and along the waterfront as the sky glows intense orange.

scene_state.functional_zone: brick tunnel archway leading to harbor

events.description: exits dark brick tunnel into open harbor area with orange sunset sky

agents.ego_description: riding horse through narrow brick tunnel toward the bright sunset-lit harbor exit

entered.detail: large stone brick archway forming the tunnel exit
moss-covered stone wall of the tunnel
green grass growing along the tunnel sides
intense orange sunset sky visible through the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, narrow brick tunnel with the camera following a horse rider. As the rider approaches the tunnel exit, intense orange sunset light floods the opening, revealing a harbor town beyond. The walls are weathered stone brick with patches of grass growing at the base.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor marketplace with wooden stalls

agents.ego_description: riding horse through harbor marketplace past wooden stalls and NPC villagers

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden market stall
villager walking along the dock edge

entered.detail: wooden market stall with canvas awning and goods displayed
medieval timber-framed building with white plaster walls
wooden dock planks extending toward the water
large wooden sailing ship with furled sails moored in harbor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a bustling harbor marketplace at sunset. The rider moves through cobblestone streets lined with wooden market stalls and timber-framed buildings. NPC villagers walk about or stand near the stalls, and a large sailing ship is visible in the distance against the orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden waterfront dock with moored sailing ships

events.description: horse slows to a walk along the narrow dock planks near the water edge

agents.ego_description: riding slowly along wooden dock with large sailing ships moored alongside the pier

entered.detail: massive wooden galleon with multiple masts and furled sails
calm water reflecting the orange sunset colors
large wooden warehouse building with open loading doors

segments.scene_description: The rider moves onto wooden dock planks extending over the water, with massive sailing ships moored alongside. The harbor water reflects the intense orange sunset. The camera moves slowly past wooden warehouses on the right while the large galleons dominate the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dock passage with wooden stairs and scaffolding

events.description: turns horse around on the dock to ride back toward the town buildings

agents.ego_description: turning the horse around on the dock and riding back toward the harbor buildings and stairs

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on wooden crate near the water's edge

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs leading up to street level from the dock
wooden tavern building with lit windows and outdoor seating
stacked wooden barrels near the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The rider turns the horse around on the narrow dock and heads back toward the town. Wooden stairs lead up to street level on the right, while a harbor tavern with glowing windows sits on the left. The camera passes wooden barrels and scaffolding as it moves away from the large ships.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street between timber and brick buildings

events.description: rides up wooden stairs from dock level to elevated street level
enters narrow alley between tall brick buildings with overhanging upper floors

agents.ego_description: riding up wooden stairs and through narrow cobblestone streets between medieval buildings

notable_agents.action: villager walking down the narrow street toward the camera
group of villagers gathered near building entrance

entered.detail: tall red brick building wall with small windows
half-timbered house with dark wooden beams
narrow passage between tall buildings with cobblestone ground

segments.scene_description: The rider ascends wooden stairs from the dock to street level, entering a narrow alley between tall brick and timber buildings. The space is more enclosed with overhanging upper floors. Villagers walk through the cobblestone street, some approaching from the opposite direction as the camera navigates the tight passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront cobblestone path with wooden railings

agents.ego_description: riding along the waterfront cobblestone path with harbor water visible to the left and buildings to the right

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the waterfront path in the same direction

entered.detail: cobblestone path running parallel to the harbor water
wooden fence railing along the building edge
large stone building with gothic architectural features
tall stone tower visible in the distance against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The rider emerges back onto an open waterfront path with cobblestone paving and wooden railings. The harbor water is visible to the left with the orange sunset reflecting off its surface. Stone buildings line the right side, and a distant tower rises against the colorful sky. The path follows the curve of the harbor with moderate pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a dark tunnel into a sprawling, sun-drenched medieval harbor town. It begins within a narrow brick passage, moving toward a bright opening where intense orange sunset light floods the frame to reveal a bustling marketplace of cobblestone streets and timber-framed buildings. As the rider progresses, the scene expands onto wooden dock planks where massive sailing ships and reflecting waters dominate the view, before the camera turns back toward the town past glowing tavern windows and wooden scaffolding. The movement then shifts into a tight, enclosed alleyway with overhanging upper floors and passing villagers, finally emerging onto an open waterfront path. This final stretch follows the curve of the harbor, passing stone buildings and a distant tower under a vibrant, colorful sky.
